info.title: SDKWork Canvas App API
info.description: App/client authority skeleton for SDKWork Canvas page workspaces. Durable page bytes, folders, assets, and versions are Drive-backed; Notes owns page metadata, object model, search, sync, and AI governance metadata.

tags.name: canvas
tags.description: AI-native Notes app API resource surface.

get.summary: List Notes workspaces visible to the current app principal.

post.summary: Create a Notes workspace and bind it to a Drive Notes space or compatible app-upload space.

get.summary: Retrieve workspace bootstrap metadata for editor startup.
Retrieve Notes page metadata and Drive binding references.

post.summary: Apply a queued sync mutation to a Notes page.

get.summary: Retrieve Drive-backed page content through the Notes facade.

put.summary: Update Drive-backed page content and refresh Notes current version pointers.

get.summary: List Drive node versions for a Notes page through the Notes business facade.
Search Notes page projections while preserving Drive version provenance.

post.summary: Create an auditable AI job for selected pages, collections, or workspace context.

get.summary: List reviewable AI suggestions for a Notes page.

post.summary: Accept a reviewable AI suggestion for a Notes page.
Reject a reviewable AI suggestion for a Notes page.
Apply an accepted AI suggestion to Drive-backed page content.

200.description: Applied AI suggestion page content result.

post.summary: Record user feedback for an AI suggestion quality loop.
Restore a Drive-owned page content version through the Notes business facade.

200.description: Restored page content envelope with the new current Drive version.

DriveVersionIdPath.name: driveVersionId
DriveVersionIdPath.description: Drive-owned node version id exposed through the Notes page facade.

data.description: Operation-specific payload typed per response schema.

item.description: Typed domain resource for the operation.

SdkWorkPlatformErrorCode.description: Platform or domain error code per API_SPEC.md §15.3.
